chunks.text:
Clean n Pristine, Inc. — Professional house cleaning service in Richardson. Services:
- Regular house cleaning
- Deep cleaning
- Move-in/move-out cleaning
- Office cleaning
- Post-construction cleaning

- Address: 635 Presidential Dr, Richardson, TX 75081

- Service Area: Richardson, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 4. 8 stars with 185 reviews.
